title: WEATHERIZATION - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS OFFICE WEATHERIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides whole-home weatherization services, including a home audit that may include insulation installation, duct sealing, weather stripping, health and safety repairs, and replacement of inefficient appliances (e.g., furnaces, refrigerators). 1144 Warm Springs Street Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Income no higher than 200% of the federal poverty level. Applicants can be renters or homeowners and live in mobile homes or site-built homes. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 553-0497 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 553-0497 Main phone Main phone (541) 553-0497 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information or visit website to apply online FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income for all household members over age 18, current copy of electric bill, current copy of gas bill (if applicable), landlord's signature (if applicant is a renter), and proof of homeownership (if applicant is a homeowner). Other documents related to the structure and property will be discussed during the audit process. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: Furnaces Home Safety Devices Refrigerators Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS OFFICE
